edc:properties.edc:name: HealthDCAT-AP Federated Catalog
edc:properties.edc:description: HealthDCAT-AP v1.0 compliant dataset catalog exposing metadata for all health datasets in the knowledge graph. Serves JSON-LD with W3C DCAT-AP 3.0 + HealthDCAT-AP extensions for federated catalog discovery across Health Data Access Bodies.
